LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS MICHAEL LOVE AND PHYLLIS LOVE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF DID NOT CREATE A MATERIAL DISPUTE OF FACT; PLAINTIFF DID NOT DEMONSTRATE BY CLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE MALICE, FRAUD OR OPPRESSION AS REQUIRED BY CIVIL CODE SECTION 3294. OUT OF THE PRESENCE OF ATTORNEYS, COURT PLACES THE EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS ON THE RECORD. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
